description: Shamir's Secret Sharing over GF(256) with BIP-39 word output — human-readable, speakable secret shares.
rules: Shares are BIP-39 word sequences — they can be written down, spoken aloud, or stored as seed phrases.
Threshold (t) and total shares (n) are configurable. A 2-of-3 split is the most common pattern.
Works over GF(256) — each byte of the secret is split independently.
